title: Buttery Flaky Rye Stir-fry
description: This Mediterranean-inspired post-workout dish combines the nutty flavor of rye with a mediterranean-friendly stir-fry for a delicious and healthy meal.
instructions: Toast the rye breadcrumbs in a dry skillet over medium heat for about 2-3 minutes until golden brown.
In a large bowl, mix the toasted breadcrumbs with minced garlic and unsalted butter. Stir well until evenly coated.
Toss the mixed vegetables (bell pepper, zucchini, cherry tomatoes) with olive oil and salt in another bowl. Season to taste.
Spread the breadcrumb mixture on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Spread it out evenly, creating a thin layer.
Evenly distribute the vegetable mixture over the top of the breadcrumb mixture. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crisp around the edges.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
